title: Developing Cloud Controller Manager — Out of tree
text:
To build an out-of-tree cloud-controller-manager for your cloud:
Create a go package with an implementation that satisfies
cloudprovider.Interface
.
Use
main.go
in cloud-controller-manager
from Kubernetes core as a template for your
main.go
. As mentioned above, the only difference should be the cloud package that will be imported.
Import your cloud package in
main.go
, ensure your package has an
init
block to run
cloudprovider.RegisterCloudProvider
.
Many cloud providers publish their controller manager code as open source. If you are creating
a new cloud-controller-manager from scratch, you could take an existing out-of-tree cloud
controller manager as your starting point.
